title: 'Glued to windows': How Artemis II astronauts spent their first hours on Orion en route to Moon
summary_full: Nasa astronauts aboard the Orion spacecraft are enjoying breathtaking views of Earth as the mission successfully executed a critical engine burn to propel them towards the Moon. The Artemis II mission is progressing as planned, with all systems and crew functioning optimally during this crucial test flight.
